qa.summary: Corrected BA spec is accurate and internally consistent. All four factual claims verified against live code and git history. M4 (add test_targetless_wildcard_matches_any_path) is the correct and complete remaining work. No objections raised.

evidence_quality.notes: All three code-location claims verified by direct file read at exact line numbers. Commit becffc6 confirmed to contain all three fixes via git show. Test absence confirmed by grep (exit 1, count 0). Pytest count 40 confirmed by live collection run.

scope_alignment.notes: User requirement: fix task_id mismatch + targetless wildcard regression, backward-compatible, pass existing tests. BA's Must Have (M4 + M5) directly encodes both: M4 adds the missing wildcard test; M5 requires 41+ passing. M1/M2/M3 correctly classified as verify-only since fixes are committed. No universalist claim from user requirement is hidden in Won't Have or out_of_scope without explicit user confirmation. WN1-WN4 are clearly non-goals unrelated to the user's stated requirement.

investigation_completeness.notes: BA performed: git status check (clean), grep for missing test (absent), pytest run (40 collected/passed), code read at cited lines, commit attribution via git show. No audit deliverable was required by user that BA skipped.

affected_file_accuracy.notes:
All cited file paths exist and contain exactly the code BA claimed. Verified:
- hooks/lib/allowlist.py:521-523: entry_target = entry.get('target'); if entry_target is None or entry_target == target_path: return entry (EXACT match)
- hooks/pretool-write-guard.sh:59-65: writer_key candidate-list with deduplication (EXACT match to line range)
- hooks/posttool-allowlist-consume.py:148-155: mirrored candidate-list (EXACT match, env_task_id + seen set pattern)
- hooks/tests/test_allowlist_consolidation.py:534-633: TestMatchSentinelGrantForWrite class with 5 test methods, ends at line 633 before __main__ block (EXACT)

spec_text_vs_execution_drift.notes: AC1 recipe: grep -c test_targetless_wildcard_matches_any_path hooks/tests/test_allowlist_consolidation.py returns >= 1. Verified this is the correct runnable command for that AC (grep -c returns integer count, and currently returns 0 confirming test absent). AC2 recipe: python3 -m pytest hooks/tests/test_allowlist_consolidation.py -v — confirmed runnable, currently produces 40 passed. AC3 recipe: python3 -m py_compile — standard and runnable. AC4 recipe: git diff HEAD~1 HEAD --name-only — correct for post-commit verification. No drift between spec text and executable commands.

claim_1_working_tree_clean.claim: git status: nothing to commit, working tree clean
claim_1_working_tree_clean.method: git status --short showed only docs/dev/* modifications and untracked ba-qa-report files — hooks/lib/allowlist.py, hooks/pretool-write-guard.sh, hooks/posttool-allowlist-consume.py, and hooks/tests/test_allowlist_consolidation.py all absent from git status output (not modified)

claim_2_allowlist_521_523.claim: allowlist.py:521-523 — entry_target = entry.get('target'); if entry_target is None or entry_target == target_path: return entry
claim_2_allowlist_521_523.actual_lines:
521: entry_target = entry.get("target")
522: if entry_target is None or entry_target == target_path:
523:     return entry

claim_3_write_guard_59_65.actual_lines:
59: writer_key = env_task_id if env_task_id else session_id
60: seen = set()
61: candidates = []
62: for k in [writer_key, data_task_id, session_id]:
63:     if k and k not in seen:
64:         seen.add(k)
65:         candidates.append(k)

claim_4_posttool_148_155.actual_lines:
148: env_task_id = os.environ.get("CLAUDE_TASK_ID", "")
149: writer_primary = env_task_id if env_task_id else session_id
150: data_task_id = data.get("task_id") or ""
151: seen: set = set()
152: candidates = []
153: for c in [writer_primary, data_task_id, session_id]:
154:     if c and c not in seen:
155:         seen.add(c)

claim_7_becffc6_contains_fixes.method: git show becffc6 --stat confirmed allowlist.py (+43 lines), pretool-write-guard.sh (+69 lines), posttool-allowlist-consume.py (+52 lines), test_allowlist_consolidation.py (+102 lines). git show becffc6 diff confirmed entry_target predicate and candidate-list both added in that commit.

claim_8_testclass_534_633.claim: TestMatchSentinelGrantForWrite runs approximately lines 534-633 with 5 existing test methods
claim_8_testclass_534_633.actual: Class defined at line 534; 5 methods: test_match_returns_entry (558), test_session_mismatch_returns_none (573), test_target_mismatch_returns_none (586), test_expired_sentinel_returns_none (599), test_op_mismatch_returns_none (621); class ends at line 633; __main__ at 635

m4_correctness_assessment.rationale: All three production-code fixes (wildcard predicate, candidate-list in write-guard, mirrored candidate-list in posttool) are committed and confirmed correct at cited lines. The only artifact absent from the test suite is test_targetless_wildcard_matches_any_path. Adding this one method to TestMatchSentinelGrantForWrite is the correct and complete remaining action.

ac_coverage.AC1: grep -c test_targetless_wildcard_matches_any_path returns >= 1 after dev adds the method — appropriate and runnable
ac_coverage.AC2: pytest produces >= 41 passed, 0 failures — appropriate and runnable
ac_coverage.AC4: git diff HEAD~1 HEAD --name-only shows only test_allowlist_consolidation.py — correct scope boundary enforcement

m4_correctness_assessment.risk_3_verification: test_target_mismatch_returns_none (line 586-597) writes sentinel WITH 'target' field; the new test must omit 'target' entirely. BA's constraint is accurate: only entry.get('target') returning None (absent key) triggers the wildcard branch at allowlist.py:521-522.
